evidence_summary: Implemented an AGHUD-019 hardening slice that enforces list/detail timeout budgets and preserves partial list/detail content with scoped errors when refresh/detail operations exceed host-side latency budgets.

ui_acceptance_evidence.visual_system: No new visual primitives were added; timeout fallback uses existing status/error typography and surface language.
ui_acceptance_evidence.information_density: On timeout, current thread rows/detail remain visible so density is preserved instead of collapsing to an empty state.
ui_acceptance_evidence.motion_and_interaction: Interaction flow remains stable during delayed operations: loading transitions to scoped timeout feedback without resetting provider shell.
ui_acceptance_evidence.card_language: Existing list/detail card treatment is retained; timeout feedback is injected as status/detail text rather than introducing divergent card styles.
ui_acceptance_evidence.responsive_layout: Timeout behavior is host-side and applies consistently across sidebar/panel/editor surfaces without introducing overflow or layout branching.
